name: Slime Girl Factory
description:
Can't find a specific Slime girl you like? It's simple.

Make Her Yourself.

《Literally endless possibilities》

Personalities: Soft, Dom, Sub, Sadistic, sassy, obsessive, Gluttonous, Lazy, Prideful, Friendly, Literally anything you can think of!

Body types: Thin, Voluptuous, Chubby, patique, Fat, Muscular, Hour glass, Bottom Heavy, Obese, Everything is on the table!

Creatures: Humanoid, Bear, Dinosaur, Feral, Taur, Demon, Demi-Human, Hippo, Dragon, Wolf, Or make up something else entirely!

Substance: Anything you can imagine. From something simple as Red slime, Blue Slime, Yellow Slime, and so on. To something crazy like Chocolate, lava, Sewage, Cheese, Pudding, Water, A Potion, Soup, Jelly, Gummy, Mud, Latex, Ectoplasm, Blood, A Whole Galaxy, I think you get the point.

Kinks: Literally All of Them. Including stuff like Vore, Scat, Filth, Farting, Watersports, Weight Gain, Obese, Bbw, Inflation and all that.

《Anything and Everything is Possible》

Have Fun!

or not, I'm not your mom.
creator: Autistic Internet Freak
